codeReview.summary: Implementation provides append-only JSONL logging with schema versioning, replay iterators, and builder pattern. All 11 tests pass. Thread safety is acceptable for single-process use via OS-level atomic appends.

issues.description: serde_json::to_value(payload).unwrap_or_default() silently converts serialization errors to empty JSON object {}, potentially masking bugs. Consider returning an error instead.
current_entry field in EventLogReplayIter is set but never read - dead field that adds noise to the struct
Comment states 'Parse a schema-versioned JSON entry, handling version differences' but actual code makes no attempt to handle version differences - it just tries to parse directly

sharedStateObservations.observation: Event log uses io::Result<()> while other swell-memory modules use SwellError. AGENTS.md doesn't specify which error type to use, creating inconsistency.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: event_log.rs:175 - pub fn init(&self) -> io::Result<()> vs blocks.rs, recall.rs, etc. which use Result<T, SwellError>

summary: Feature implementation passes scrutiny. Append-only JSONL event log with schema versioning is correctly implemented. Replay iterators work for both full log and task-filtered replay. All 11 tests pass. Minor issues are non-blocking: silent error handling in unwrap_or_default, dead field, and misleading comment. No thread safety issues for single-process use.
